scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: Penn evaluates the rigor available at a student's high school and asks whether the student took advantage of rigorous courses available in core subjects.
areas.detail: Penn evaluates the rigor available at a student's high school and asks whether the student took advantage of rigorous courses available in core subjects.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: Penn requires recommendation letters from two people: a school counselor or other school administrator and a teacher in a core subject area; one additional recommendation is optional.
areas.detail: Penn requires recommendation letters from two people: a school counselor or other school administrator and a teacher in a core subject area; one additional recommendation is optional.

areas.name: Essays
areas.summary: Penn asks every applicant to complete two prompts and a school-specific prompt based on the undergraduate school or dual-degree program.
areas.detail: Penn asks every applicant to complete two prompts and a school-specific prompt based on the undergraduate school or dual-degree program.
